description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1), operating in autonomous mode, was heading east on Alameda Street toward Harrison Street in San Francisco. It
 then encountered a van hauling a trailer (Vehicle 2) traveling west, partially occupying both the westbound and eastbound lanes on Alameda
 Street. The Zoox vehicle slowed for the oncoming Vehicle 2; then its operator disengaged from autonomy and manually brought the vehicle
 to a complete stop. As Vehicle 2 passed, the driver's side of Vehicle 2 scraped the driver's side of the stopped Zoox vehicle. The driver of 
Vehicle 2 failed to stop and exchange information. The Zoox vehicle sustained minor damage, and no injuries were reported. Camera 
footage from the Zoox vehicle shows that the operator of Vehicle 2 steered toward it without appearing to attempt to avoid making contact. 
The police were later notified about the incident.
Print
Clear Form
